data.content: Shipment complete. Merged beat/foolery-20ee into main (commit 31ba16ff) and pushed to origin. All quality gates passed: lint clean (1 pre-existing warning), tsc --noEmit clean, 207 test files / 2370 tests green. Merge was clean with no conflicts. The implementation commit 598b787e (Rotate take-loop agent pools across failures) is now on main.
